cards.title: Implement a decorator that measures function execution time.
cards.approach: Use functools.wraps to preserve metadata and time.time() to measure execution. Decorators are functions that modify other functions without changing their source code.
cards.code:
import functools
import time

def timer_decorator(func):
    # Your code here
    return func

cards.title: Implement a function to find duplicate elements in a list.
cards.desc: Use a set to track seen elements.
cards.approach: Use a set to track seen elements. Iterate through list and add to set if not seen, otherwise it's a duplicate. Time: O(n), Space: O(n). Alternative: sort first, compare adjacent elements.
